title: taraxacum waltheri
intro: Taraxacum waltheri is a perennial herbaceous plant, specifically a dandelion species native to Europe, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and act as a diuretic, which can help alleviate symptoms of indigestion and fluid retention. The health benefits of Taraxacum waltheri include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve liver function, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Taraxacum waltheri often include infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
